subject: New Opening: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the public sector sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a lead Software Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • Azure

Details:
Client: Förvaltningsdata AB
Start: 2024-04-01
Duration: 12 months
Location: Malmö (on-site)
Rate: up to 1100 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
